description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update, installs build-essential, cmake, libtool, autoconf, automake, git, unzip, wget and ca-certificates, then cleans the apt cache. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job_build job that executes the shell commands: cat /etc/debian_version, ./scripts/build-deps-unix.sh, ./scripts/build.sh, cd build, make, cd tests, make test, cd .., cp -a ../include ., cp src/liberpiko.a liberpiko.a, cp ../deps/libressl/crypto/.libs/libcrypto.a ., cp ../deps/libressl/ssl/.libs/libssl.a ., and tar cJf liberpiko.linux.tar.xz include liberpiko.a libcrypto.a libssl.a. The job caches the build directory and publishes the resulting build/liberpiko.linux.tar.xz as an artifact.
